specCodeDefects.defect: AC-001 uses '|| String(getValue())' which coerces empty string label to fallback. Spec Section 3.2 API contract uses 'label !== undefined ? label : String(value ?? "")' which preserves empty string labels correctly.
specCodeDefects.fixApplied: Implemented Section 3.2 pattern per C-30 (API contract authoritative). DataMapCell.tsx L60.
